question: State aur area type ke hisaab se breakdown do, jismein BCG vaccinations ki total sankhya dikhao, saath hi Pentavalent vaccine ki pehli dose ka average bhi batayein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE), AVG(T2.PENTAVALENT_1) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    dg.type_of_area, 
    SUM(fcr.bcg_vaccine) AS total_bcg_vaccinations, 
    AVG(fcr.pentavalent_1) AS average_pentavalent_first_dose
FROM 
    fact_child_immunization_routine fcr
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fcr.geography_id = dg.geography_id
GROUP BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.type_of_area;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    dg.type_of_area, 
    SUM(fcr.bcg_vaccine) AS total_bcg_vaccinations, 
    AVG(fcr.pentavalent_1) AS average_pentavalent_first_dose
FROM 
    fact_child_immunization_routine fcr
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fcr.geography_id = dg.geography_id
GROUP BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.type_of_area;
